tasks.title: Extend PipelineState type with subTaskIds field
tasks.description: Add `subTaskIds: string[]` to the PipelineState interface in frontend/src/types/index.ts. This is a non-breaking additive change — no existing consumer reads this field yet.
acceptance_criteria: PipelineState interface in frontend/src/types/index.ts has `subTaskIds: string[]`
TypeScript compiles with zero errors after the change
Existing PipelineState usages (store, PipelineProgressBar) do not require changes — subTaskIds defaults to [] in all initialisers

tasks.title: Implement resolveMainTaskTitle helper in useAppStore
tasks.description: Add a private helper (not exposed on the store interface) that searches the Zustand tasks slice (todo, in-progress, done) for the task matching a given taskId and returns its title, or a safe fallback string when not found. This avoids an extra API round-trip inside startPipeline and advancePipeline.
acceptance_criteria: Helper searches all three columns (todo, in-progress, done) of get().tasks
Returns task.title when found
Returns `Task ${taskId}` when not found (never throws, never returns null)
Helper is a plain function inside the store file — not added to the AppStore interface

tasks.title: Modify startPipeline to create a sub-task for stage 1
tasks.description: Before calling prepareAgentRun, call api.createTask to create a sub-task for stage 1. Store the returned ID in pipelineState.subTaskIds. Pass the sub-task ID (not the main task ID) to prepareAgentRun. Abort the pipeline with an error toast if the API call fails.
acceptance_criteria: api.createTask is called with title `[mainTaskTitle] / Stage 1: [agentDisplayName]`, type `research`, assigned `stages[0]`, description referencing the main taskId
pipelineState is initialised with subTaskIds containing the new sub-task ID
prepareAgentRun is called with the sub-task ID, not the main task ID
On createTask failure: pipelineState is set to null, error toast shown with message containing 'stage 1'
agentDisplayName resolution falls back to the raw agent ID when availableAgents does not contain the entry

tasks.title: Modify advancePipeline to create a sub-task for each subsequent stage
tasks.description: Before calling prepareAgentRun for stages 2–N, call api.createTask to create the stage's sub-task. Append the returned ID to pipelineState.subTaskIds. Pass the sub-task ID to prepareAgentRun. Abort with an error toast on failure.
acceptance_criteria: api.createTask called with correct title pattern `[mainTaskTitle] / Stage N: [agentDisplayName]` for each stage index
pipelineState.subTaskIds grows by exactly one entry per advancePipeline call
prepareAgentRun called with the new sub-task ID (not pipelineState.taskId)
On createTask failure: pipelineState set to null, error toast shown with stage number
The main task (pipelineState.taskId) is never passed to prepareAgentRun in advancePipeline

tasks.title: Add structured log for pipeline sub-task creation
tasks.description: After each successful api.createTask call in startPipeline and advancePipeline, emit a console.log in the same structured JSON format already used by executeAgentRun (event: pipeline_subtask_created, stageIndex, subTaskId, mainTaskId, agentId).
acceptance_criteria: console.log emits valid JSON with keys: timestamp, level, component, event, stageIndex, subTaskId, mainTaskId, agentId
component value is 'agent-launcher' (consistent with existing log in executeAgentRun)
Log is emitted on success only — not on failure path

tasks.title: Unit tests — resolveMainTaskTitle and PipelineState initialisation
tasks.description: Write Vitest unit tests covering the resolveMainTaskTitle helper and the updated PipelineState initialisation in startPipeline.
acceptance_criteria: Test: resolveMainTaskTitle finds task in todo column
Test: resolveMainTaskTitle finds task in in-progress column
Test: resolveMainTaskTitle finds task in done column
Test: resolveMainTaskTitle returns fallback string when task not in any column
Test: startPipeline sets subTaskIds to array containing the new sub-task ID
Test: startPipeline calls prepareAgentRun with sub-task ID, not main task ID
All tests pass with `cd frontend && npm test`

tasks.title: Unit tests — startPipeline and advancePipeline error paths
tasks.description: Write Vitest unit tests for the failure branches: createTask rejection in startPipeline, createTask rejection in advancePipeline.
acceptance_criteria: Test: startPipeline on createTask failure → pipelineState is null after call
Test: startPipeline on createTask failure → error toast message contains 'stage 1'
Test: advancePipeline on createTask failure → pipelineState is null after call
Test: advancePipeline on createTask failure → error toast message contains stage number
Test: advancePipeline happy path → subTaskIds length equals nextStageIndex + 1
All tests pass with `cd frontend && npm test`

tasks.title: Integration test — useAgentCompletion triggers on sub-task done
tasks.description: Write a Vitest test confirming that useAgentCompletion fires correctly when the sub-task (not the main task) moves to the done column, and that the main task remaining in its original column does not trigger a false positive.
acceptance_criteria: Test: activeRun.taskId points to sub-task ID; sub-task appears in done with updatedAt >= startedAt → clearActiveRun called
Test: main task moves to done while activeRun.taskId = sub-task ID → clearActiveRun NOT called
Test: sub-task in done with updatedAt < startedAt → clearActiveRun NOT called (timestamp guard still honored)
All tests pass with `cd frontend && npm test`
